title: Looking for Category Manager at Cleartrip

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Cleartrip
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Category Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
